title: [ESI] [Cosim] Struct encoding
body:
I switched off of using `esi::StructType` since I couldn't figure out a good (easy, elegant, efficient) way to universally lower it to `rtl::StructType`. As such, struct and interface names are ugly, but working.

- Added builder for `rtl.struct_extract`.
- Added integration test.
- Added "memory" allocation to segment builder.
- Added Capnp struct encoding support
  - Doesn't support embedded structs, but could really easily.
- Fixes memory error on segment builder deconstruction
  - Interval allocator has to be listed first to ensure correct deconstruction order. I wouldn't think it would be sensitive to this.
- Adds unit test.
